tasks.notes: FGAP-026 phase 1.2 re-plan progress at HEAD 5adf428. Sections landed: A bb2c7d5 (resolver foundation) → B 9846b90 (pi-context internal cascade + initProject self-bootstrap) → C.1 8f33a38 (pi-context fixtures 390/0/0) → audit-fix cluster 1a98345/e780db0/7cd3c6c/b94264b (D-A-1 schema-validator cascade + D-B-2 naming unification + D-B-3/D-B-4 BootstrapNotFoundError catch + Fix 1 follow-up) → DEC-0018 e4ad4aa (runtime demo + adversarial probe per step + CLAUDE.md binding) → E 55a03c2 (husky gate) then revert 278b2b8 (gate-window open) → C.2 99436c3 (pi-jit-agents fixtures 150/0/1) → 2cb8e62 substrate refresh → 987164e (issue-091 filed-then-closed + Phase 6.3 scope expanded to include block-kind selection per onboarding-replaces-hand-edit insight) → 5adf428 (tsx-barrel flake catalog filed). DEC-0018 retroactive verification COMPLETE: Phase 1 runtime demos 14/14 PASS after 7-task redo (B.1 initProject direct + B.2 loadConfig + C.1.a readBlock-trap + C.2.c buildIdIndex-trap + AF.2 functional + addWork BNF + tsx-barrel catalog); Phase 2 adversarial probe PASS at /tmp/phase2-adversarial-probe.md (zero defects; 51 production .project hits all classified legitimate; writeBootstrapPointer default-arg verified non-leaking; differential-trap defeat verified for 4 cascade probes; 4 pi-jit-agents no-cascade classifications independently traced; 5 false-pass scenarios probed). Ahead: Section C.3 (pi-workflows ~35 mkdtempSync sites), Section C.4 (pi-behavior-monitors ~8 vitest sites), Section D (jit-agents static test-fixtures/ — likely empty per C.2 audit), Section F (project-dir.test.ts NEW 7 tests), Section E re-roll (husky gate after cross-package green restored), Phase 1.3 (read-config + read-schema tools).
